In a medium sauce pot or rondeau, begin reducing the vinegar and mirin together over low heat.
Reduce by half (use scale to check reduction; should be nape and syrup-like)
Remove from heat and add the Kabayaki
Mix well and cool in ice bath or blast chiller
Reserve to quart containers (can be done before cooling)
